steps.title: Focus on the requested location
steps.content: The student wants to specify where Hadramphus tuberculatus was identified. The notes give that location as New Zealand, so the answer must name that place for that species.

steps.title: Reject wrong or incomplete details
steps.content:
• Choice A names Argentina but describes Catagonus wagneri, the wrong species.
  • Choice B names the correct species and year but leaves out the location.
  • Choice D explains Lazarus species generally without saying where Hadramphus tuberculatus was identified.
The answer is C.
